plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: OPAi Police uses your approximate foreground location only when you choose local weather for the Home Dashboard. Location is not tracked in the background.

plugins.microphonePermission: OPAi Police uses the microphone only when you choose voice translation. Audio is sent securely for translation and is not stored by OPAi.

plugins.photosPermission: OPAi Police accesses only the image you select for translation.
plugins.cameraPermission: OPAi Police uses the camera only when you choose image translation.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: OPAi Police uses your approximate foreground location only when you choose local weather for the Home Dashboard. Location is not tracked in the background.
